mapper.sql:
SELECT
info.`id`, info.`game_id`, info.`game_name`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`venue_id`, info.`venue_code`, info.`venue_name`, info.`venue_type`, s_g.`status`, info.`support_device`, info.`icon`, info.`icon_i18n_code`, info.`se_icon_i18n_code`, info.`vt_icon_i18n_code`, info.`ht_icon_i18n_code`, info.`game_desc`, info.`game_desc_i18n_code`, s_g.`remark`, info.`is_rebate`, info.`access_parameters`, s_g.`maintenance_start_time`, s_g.`maintenance_end_time`,
s_g.label as label,s_g.corner_labels as cornerLabels,s_g.creator as creator,
s_g.created_time as createdTime,s_g.updater as updater,s_g.updated_time as updatedTime, s_g.currency_code

SELECT info.`id`, info.`game_id`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`venue_code`, s_g.`status`, info.`icon_i18n_code`, info.`se_icon_i18n_code`, info.`vt_icon_i18n_code`, info.`ht_icon_i18n_code`, info.`game_desc_i18n_code`, info.`access_parameters`, s_g.`maintenance_start_time`, s_g.`maintenance_end_time`, s_g.label as label, s_g.corner_labels as cornerLabels, s_g.creator as creator, s_g.created_time as createdTime, s_g.updater as updater, s_g.updated_time as updatedTime, s_g.currency_code, two_sort.sort, tw_info.id as gameTwoId, ifnull(tw_info.sort, 100) as classTwoSort, tw_info.icon as classTwoIcon, tw_info.type_i18n_code as gameTwoClassName, two_sort.game_one_hot_sort, two_sort.game_one_id as gameOneId, two_sort.game_one_home_sort as gameOneHomeSort, tw_info.ht_icon_i18n_code as classTwoHtIconI18nCode, tw_info.site_label_change_type as siteLabelChangeType FROM site_game s_g
INNER JOIN game_info info ON s_g.game_info_id = info.id
INNER JOIN game_two_currency_sort two_sort ON two_sort.game_id = s_g.game_info_id and two_sort.currency_code = #{currencyCode}
INNER JOIN game_two_class_info tw_info ON tw_info.id = two_sort.game_two_id and tw_info.`status` = 1
where s_g.site_code = #{siteCode} and s_g.currency_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{currencyCode}, '%') and s_g.`status` in (1, 2)
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT two_sort.game_one_home_sort, info.`id`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`game_name`, info.`venue_code`, s_g.`status` FROM site_game s_g
INNER JOIN game_info info ON s_g.game_info_id = info.id
INNER JOIN game_two_currency_sort two_sort ON two_sort.game_id = s_g.game_info_id and two_sort.currency_code = #{currencyCode}
INNER JOIN game_two_class_info tw_info ON tw_info.id = two_sort.game_two_id and tw_info.`status` = 1
where s_g.site_code = #{siteCode} and s_g.currency_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{currencyCode} , '%') and s_g.`status` in (1, 2) and two_sort.game_one_id = #{gameOneId}) t GROUP BY t.id

SELECT * FROM (SELECT
ifnull(hot.home_hot_sort, 100) as homeHotSort, info.`id`, info.`game_name`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`venue_code`, s_g.`status` FROM site_game s_g
INNER JOIN game_info info ON s_g.game_info_id = info.id
LEFT JOIN site_game_hot_sort hot ON hot.game_id = info.id AND hot.currency_code = #{currencyCode} and hot.site_code = #{siteCode}
where s_g.site_code = #{siteCode} and s_g.currency_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{currencyCode}, '%') and s_g.`status` in (1, 2) and s_g.label = 1 ) t GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.homeHotSort

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ifnull(hot.home_hot_sort, 100) as homeHotSort ,info.`id`, info.`game_id`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`venue_code`, s_g.`status`, info.`icon_i18n_code`, info.`se_icon_i18n_code`, info.`vt_icon_i18n_code`, info.`ht_icon_i18n_code`, info.`game_desc_i18n_code`, info.`access_parameters`, s_g.`maintenance_start_time`, s_g.`maintenance_end_time`, s_g.label as label, s_g.corner_labels as cornerLabels, s_g.creator as creator, s_g.created_time as createdTime, s_g.updater as updater, s_g.updated_time as updatedTime, s_g.currency_code FROM site_game s_g INNER JOIN game_info info ON s_g.game_info_id = info.id LEFT JOIN site_game_hot_sort hot ON hot.game_id = info.id AND hot.currency_code = #{requestVO.currencyCode} and hot.site_code = #{siteCode} where s_g.site_code = #{siteCode} and s_g.currency_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestVO.currencyCode}, '%') and s_g.`status` in (1, 2) and s_g.label = 1 ) tb GROUP BY tb.id ORDER BY tb.homeHotSort

SELECT * FROM (SELECT info.`id`, info.`game_id`, info.`game_i18n_code`, info.`venue_code`, s_g.`status`, info.`icon_i18n_code`, info.`se_icon_i18n_code`, info.`vt_icon_i18n_code`, info.`ht_icon_i18n_code`, info.`game_desc_i18n_code`, info.`access_parameters`, s_g.`maintenance_start_time`, s_g.`maintenance_end_time`, s_g.label as label, s_g.corner_labels as cornerLabels, s_g.creator as creator, s_g.created_time as createdTime, s_g.updater as updater, s_g.updated_time as updatedTime, s_g.currency_code FROM site_game s_g
INNER JOIN game_info info ON s_g.game_info_id = info.id
INNER JOIN game_collection g_c ON g_c.game_id = info.id
LEFT JOIN game_two_currency_sort two_sort ON two_sort.game_id = info.id
LEFT JOIN game_two_class_info tw_info ON tw_info.id = two_sort.game_two_id and tw_info.`status` = 1
where s_g.site_code = #{siteCode} and s_g.currency_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{currencyCode}, '%') and s_g.`status` in (1, 2)
AND g_c.user_id = #{userId}
AND tw_info.id = #{twoId}
AND info.game_i18n_code IN
#{item}
ORDER BY g_c.created_time ) tb GROUP BY tb.id

SELECT * FROM (SELECT info.id, info.game_name, info.game_i18n_code, info.venue_code,info.access_parameters FROM site_game sg INNER JOIN game_info info ON info.id = sg.game_info_id INNER JOIN game_two_currency_sort sort ON sort.game_id = info.id INNER JOIN game_two_class_info two ON two.id = sort.game_two_id INNER JOIN game_one_class_info one ON one.id = sort.game_one_id WHERE sg.`status` in (1) and one.`status` = 1 and two.`status` = 1 and sg.site_code = #{siteCode} AND one.site_code = #{siteCode} AND two.site_code = #{siteCode} AND sort.site_code = #{siteCode} and info.venue_code = #{venueCode} and sort.currency_code = #{currencyCode}) t GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id
